requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety — INSO Standards (220 V / 50 Hz / Type C/F Plug)
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全 — INSO标准（220 V / 50 Hz / C/F型插头）
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全 — INSO標準（220 V / 50 Hz / C/F型插頭）

summary.en: Iran operates on a 220 V / 50 Hz mains supply with Type C (two-pin Europlug) and Type F (Schuko-compatible) sockets — the standard European-continental plug system. All mains-powered wireless and electronic equipment must comply with applicable INSO electrical safety standards, which are derived from IEC 62368-1 (Audio/Video, IT and Communications Technology Equipment — Safety Requirements) or predecessor IEC 60950-1 / IEC 60065 standards as transitioned by ISIRI. Test reports from an accredited laboratory to the applicable INSO/IEC safety standard, and where applicable INSO conformity marking on the product, are required. Products designed for China's 220 V / 50 Hz supply (Type A or I plug) may need plug adaptation; Chinese power supply designs are technically close to Iranian voltage/frequency requirements but plug format differs.
summary.zh: 伊朗使用220 V / 50 Hz市电，配备C型（两脚欧式插头）和F型（Schuko兼容）插座 — 即标准欧洲大陆插头系统。所有市电供电的无线及电子设备须符合适用的INSO电气安全标准，该标准源自IEC 62368-1（音视频、信息技术及通信技术设备 — 安全要求）或ISIRI已转换的前身标准IEC 60950-1 / IEC 60065。须提交经认可实验室依据适用INSO/IEC安全标准出具的测试报告，适用时还须在产品上标注INSO合规标志。为中国220 V / 50 Hz供电设计的产品（A型或I型插头）可能需要转换插头；中国电源设计在技术上与伊朗电压/频率要求接近，但插头格式不同。
summary.zht: 伊朗使用220 V / 50 Hz市電，配備C型（兩腳歐式插頭）和F型（Schuko相容）插座 — 即標準歐洲大陸插頭系統。所有市電供電的無線及電子設備須符合適用的INSO電氣安全標準，該標準源自IEC 62368-1（音視頻、信息技術及通信技術設備 — 安全要求）或ISIRI已轉換的前身標準IEC 60950-1 / IEC 60065。須提交經認可實驗室依據適用INSO/IEC安全標準出具的測試報告，適用時還須在產品上標注INSO合規標誌。為中國220 V / 50 Hz供電設計的產品（A型或I型插頭）可能需要轉換插頭；中國電源設計在技術上與伊朗電壓/頻率要求接近，但插頭格式不同。

standards_or_laws: INSO standard derived from IEC 62368-1 (AV/IT/communications equipment safety)
INSO standard derived from IEC 60950-1 (predecessor IT equipment safety — may still apply for legacy products)
Plug / socket standard: Type C (Europlug CEE 7/16) and Type F (Schuko CEE 7/4)

summary.en: In China, electrical safety for information technology and AV equipment is governed by GB 4943.1 (derived from IEC 62368-1 / IEC 60950-1). CCC certification requires safety testing to GB 4943.1. China mains supply is also 220 V / 50 Hz; however, China uses Type A (two flat parallel pins) and Type I (two or three flat angled pins) plugs, which differ from Iran's Type C/F system. Chinese-market adapters will require plug format change for Iran use.
summary.zh: 在中国，信息技术及视听设备的电气安全由GB 4943.1（源自IEC 62368-1 / IEC 60950-1）规范。CCC认证须按GB 4943.1进行安全测试。中国市电同为220 V / 50 Hz；但中国使用A型（两平行扁脚）和I型（两或三斜扁脚）插头，与伊朗的C/F型系统不同。中国市场的适配器在伊朗使用时须更换插头格式。
summary.zht: 在中國，信息技術及視聽設備的電氣安全由GB 4943.1（源自IEC 62368-1 / IEC 60950-1）規範。CCC認證須按GB 4943.1進行安全測試。中國市電同為220 V / 50 Hz；但中國使用A型（兩平行扁腳）和I型（兩或三斜扁腳）插頭，與伊朗的C/F型系統不同。中國市場的適配器在伊朗使用時須更換插頭格式。

standards_or_laws: China mains: 220 V / 50 Hz — Type A / Type I plugs

gap.en: Voltage and frequency (220 V / 50 Hz) match between China and Iran, reducing electrical re-design risk. However: (1) Plug format differs — Iran uses Type C/F (European continental); Chinese products typically ship with Type A or I plugs and must be adapted or re-fitted for Iran; (2) CCC safety certificates to GB 4943.1 are not directly recognised by ISIRI — a separate INSO/IEC 62368-1 compliant test report is required; (3) INSO conformity marking must appear on the product where mandated by ISIRI product-specific standards.
gap.zh: 中国与伊朗的电压和频率（220 V / 50 Hz）一致，降低了重新设计电气的风险。但：(1) 插头格式不同 — 伊朗使用C/F型（欧洲大陆式）；中国产品通常配A型或I型插头，用于伊朗时须适配或更换；(2) ISIRI不直接承认基于GB 4943.1的CCC安全证书 — 须提交独立的符合INSO/IEC 62368-1的测试报告；(3) 凡ISIRI特定产品标准有要求，产品须标注INSO合规标志。
gap.zht: 中國與伊朗的電壓和頻率（220 V / 50 Hz）一致，降低了重新設計電氣的風險。但：(1) 插頭格式不同 — 伊朗使用C/F型（歐洲大陸式）；中國產品通常配A型或I型插頭，用於伊朗時須適配或更換；(2) ISIRI不直接承認基於GB 4943.1的CCC安全證書 — 須提交獨立的符合INSO/IEC 62368-1的測試報告；(3) 凡ISIRI特定產品標準有要求，產品須標注INSO合規標誌。

source.publisher: ISIRI — Institute of Standards and Industrial Research of Iran

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Electrical safety conformity to INSO standards (derived from IEC 62368-1) is mandatory for mains-powered wireless and electronic equipment in Iran. CCC certificates to GB 4943.1 are not accepted substitutes. Products must be fitted with Type C/F (European-continental) plugs for the Iranian market; China's Type A/I plugs are incompatible without adaptation.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 符合INSO标准（源自IEC 62368-1）的电气安全合规对伊朗市电供电无线及电子设备为强制要求。基于GB 4943.1的CCC证书不可作为替代。产品须为伊朗市场配备C/F型（欧洲大陆式）插头；中国A/I型插头在未经适配的情况下不兼容。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 符合INSO標準（源自IEC 62368-1）的電氣安全合規對伊朗市電供電無線及電子設備為強制要求。基於GB 4943.1的CCC證書不可作為替代。產品須為伊朗市場配備C/F型（歐洲大陸式）插頭；中國A/I型插頭在未經適配的情況下不相容。
